nodes.name: Build Push Requests
nodes.notes: Before activating, replace PASTE_VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY_HERE and PASTE_SEND_SECRET_HERE. This sends empty Web Push payloads; the app service worker displays the default 'New customer message' notification.

parameters.jsCode:
const responses = $input.all();
return [{ json: { ok: true, attempted: responses.length } }];
